notes.params: Produced by research/optimize.py (walk-forward validated). Arrays are per volatility regime [low, mid, high].
notes.risk_dial: Scales leverage. 1.0 = validated config (~2.2-2.4x). 2.0 doubles leverage (max ~5x): OOS growth ~11%/mo but worst-case single-stop equity hit ~50%. Never set above 2.0.
notes.sl: Protective stop. It is part of the strategy's safety architecture - keep it ON live. Walk-forward it fired ~2.5x/year at ~25% equity damage per hit.
notes.dry_run: true = log actions only, no webhook POSTs. Run dry for at least a week before going live.
